understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level while avoiding hazards (especially spike tiles) and using at most 2 attempts per level with a 50-turn budget per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT) or interact with the map via CLICK. After a horizontal move, gravity automatically moves the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (landing on spikes ends the attempt immediately), or reach the '+' goal. CLICK removes breakable/clickable blocks ('x') at a specified target position without moving the player and is used to open fall paths. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a mistake. Planning uses the provided landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan passages) to choose safe moves that change vertical sections toward the goal.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on each level while avoiding hazards (especially spike tiles) and using at most 2 attempts per level with a 50-turn budget per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal action (MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT) or interact with the map via CLICK. After a horizontal move, gravity automatically moves the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (landing on spikes ends the attempt immediately), or reach the '+' goal. Planning uses the provided landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan passages) to choose safe moves that change vertical sections toward the goal.
